themeVariables.fontFamily: IBM Plex Sans Condensed, Bahnschrift Condensed, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

themeCSS: .node rect,.node circle,.node ellipse,.node polygon,.node path,.label-container,.cluster rect{rx:0!important;ry:0!important;shape-rendering:crispEdges;} .cluster text,.nodeLabel,.edgeLabel{font-weight:600;} .edgeLabel rect,.labelBkg{fill:#F1EEE6!important;stroke:#111315!important;stroke-width:1px!important;} .flowchart-link,.edgePath path{stroke:#4B4F52!important;stroke-width:1.6px!important;} .marker path{fill:#4B4F52!important;stroke:#4B4F52!important;} .cluster span,.nodeLabel p{line-height:1.3!important;}
